question: Is the image a realistic, wide-angle photo of a construction site with overcast diffused lighting?
Is there a yellow crane hook positioned in the upper center of the frame?
Is there a black chain hanging vertically below the hook with a silver swivel ring at the end?
Is there a set of blue scaffolding with a grid pattern on the left side of the frame?
Is there a fluorescent yellow reflective vest draped on the scaffolding with horizontal silver strips?
Are there exactly two ladders positioned to the right of the scaffolding?
Is the silver aluminum ladder leaning diagonally with its top pointing toward the upper left?
Is the black folding ladder half-unfolded, standing in front of the scaffolding with steps facing the camera?
Is there a stack of gray concrete blocks in the left foreground piled in three layers?
Is the top layer of the concrete block stack missing one block to form a groove?
Are there exactly two hard hats placed on top of the concrete blocks?
Is the left hard hat yellow with a scratched brim facing right?
Is the right hard hat purple with its brim facing left?
Is there a bundle of dark gray rebar on the ground to the right of the blocks?
Do the rebar ends point toward the right and feature bright blue paint marks?
Is there an orange cement mixer in the middle-back with its drum opening facing left?
Is there a green wheelbarrow loaded with light-colored sand positioned in front of the mixer?
Is there a white hard hat hanging on the wheelbarrow's right handle with the opening facing downward?
Is there a tape measure on the ground left of the wheelbarrow with the tape extended toward the lower left?
Are there exactly seven plywood sheets standing upright to the right-rear of the wheelbarrow?
Are the outermost two plywood sheets slightly offset to reveal layered edges?
Is there a fluorescent pink waterproof tarp to the left of the plywood?
Are the edges of the pink tarp weighted with gravel?
Are there exactly three orange traffic cones arranged in a triangle in the center of the frame?
Are there exactly two warning tapes crossing in an X shape between the traffic cones?
Is one warning tape yellow-and-black striped and the other blue-and-white striped?
Is there a red toolbox in the right foreground with its lid half-open?
Are there exactly two cordless drills on the toolbox: one black (left) and one white (right)?
Do the drill bits of both drills point toward the left?
Is there an orange extension cord coiled in a flat circle beside the drills with the plug facing the bottom?
Are there exactly two rolls of blueprint paper in the right-center, with one being black-based and blank?
Is there a shallow puddle in the right bottom corner reflecting the crane hook, scaffolding, and traffic cones?
Is the image free of severe artifacts, distortions, or physical implausibilities?
